summary: Iteration 273 - The Five Sages Expert Advisor System. All backend API tests PASSED (23/23). Frontend components verified: SageAvatar, SageAudience modal, QuestHUD all working correctly. AI-powered Sage greetings and chat responses working via GPT-5.2/Emergent LLM Key integration.
critical_code_review_comments: sages.py: Well-structured with 5 unique Sage personas, each with distinct system prompts, zones, and personality traits
sages.py: Proper MongoDB _id exclusion in get_user_progress() function
sages.py: Good error handling with fallback greetings when LLM fails
SageContext.js: Clean state management with proper token-based auth checks
QuestHUD.js: Properly hides on auth/cinematic pages, shows active quests with progress tracking
SageAudience.js: Full chat interface with quest request functionality

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Sage UI components working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing user progress data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 273 tested The Five Sages Expert Advisor System. All 5 Sages (Kaelen, Sora, Elara, Finn, Vesper) are working correctly with unique personas. Key data-testids: sage-avatar, sage-crystal, sage-audience-btn, sage-audience-modal, sage-chat-input, sage-chat-send, request-quest-btn, audience-close, quest-hud, complete-quest-btn. Quest system awards Lumens (XP) and Stardust (currency). Level up every 100 Lumens.

GET /api/sages/list.details: Returns all 5 Sages with correct info (id, name, zone, archetype, tone, domain, avatar_color)

GET /api/sages/progress.details: Returns user progress with lumens, level, stardust fields

POST /api/sages/greet/{sage_id}.details: Returns AI-generated greeting from each Sage in character

POST /api/sages/chat.details: Chat with Sage returns AI response, conversation saved to DB

POST /api/sages/generate-quest/{sage_id}.details: Creates personalized quest with title, description, objective, rewards

POST /api/sages/quests/complete.details: Marks quest complete, awards Lumens/Stardust, updates progress

SageContext_loads_progress.details: SageContext fetches user progress and active quests on auth

QuestHUD_displays_quests.details: QuestHUD visible at top-left showing 'First Light Logbook' quest

SageAvatar_appears.details: SageAvatar with crystal appears on zone entry

SageAudience_modal.details: Audience modal opens with chat input, quest request button

sage_personas_verified.sora: Sora the Seer - Oracle Chamber - Cryptic/Enigmatic - Purple #8B5CF6
